1.2.3.name: TIME-12
1.2.3.author: TiagoLr
1.2.3.description: Delay modulator similar to plugins like GrossBeat or TimeShaper. Can be used for stutter effects, tape stop, glitch, scratch, reverse, pitch shift and more.

1.2.2.name: TIME-12
1.2.2.author: TiagoLr
1.2.2.description: Delay modulator similar to plugins like GrossBeat or TimeShaper. Can be used for stutter effects, tape stop, glitch, scratch, reverse, pitch shift and more.
1.2.2.changes: Fixed wrong audio display in Ardour DAW

1.2.1.name: TIME-12
1.2.1.author: TiagoLr
1.2.1.description: Delay modulator similar to plugins like GrossBeat or TimeShaper. Can be used for stutter effects, tape stop, glitch, scratch, reverse, pitch shift and more.

1.1.8.name: TIME-12
1.1.8.author: TiagoLr
1.1.8.description: Delay modulator similar to plugins like GrossBeat or TimeShaper. Can be used for stutter effects, tape stop, glitch, scratch, reverse, pitch shift and more.

1.0.3.name: TetraOP
1.0.3.author: TiagoLr
1.0.3.description: Four-operator wavetable FM synthesizer inspired by Ableton Operator, with an FM/ring-modulation routing matrix, 16-voice unison per operator, phase distortion, dual multi-mode filters and drag-and-drop modulation.
1.0.3.changes:
Revert pitch bend as it was working correctly.
Add modwheel.

1.1.1.name: Sirial
1.1.1.author: TiagoLr
1.1.1.changes:
- Add Square and triangle modulation modes
- Clear all on host reset()
- Remove clear on stop and clear on loop
- Invert time pickers range

1.5.19.name: RipplerX
1.5.19.author: TiagoLr
1.5.19.description: A physically modeled synth, capable of sounds similar to AAS Chromaphone and Ableton Collision.
1.5.19.changes: Update JUCE version to improve Wine support.

1.4.0.name: REEV-R
1.4.0.author: TiagoLr
1.4.0.description: Convolution reverb with modulation for pre/send and post/volume signals.
1.4.0.changes:
Add band splitting
Fix crash when transforming send or reverb amount
Fix UI scale not being recalled

1.3.2.name: REEV-R
1.3.2.author: TiagoLr
1.3.2.description: Convolution reverb with modulation for pre/send and post/volume signals.
1.3.2.changes:
EQ improvements
- Added 6dB slope lowpass and highpass filters
- Other QoL improvements

1.0.2.name: REEV-R
1.0.2.author: TiagoLr
1.0.2.description: Convolution reverb with modulation for pre/send and post/volume signals.
1.0.2.changes: - Revert small change to FFT block size calc, very long IRs should work now.

1.1.2.name: QDelay
1.1.2.author: TiagoLr
1.1.2.description: A dual-delay with more features than it should.
1.1.2.changes:
Clear all on host reset()
Remove clear on stop and clear on loop
Invert time pickers range

1.1.1.name: QDelay
1.1.1.author: TiagoLr
1.1.1.description: A dual-delay with more features than it should.
1.1.1.changes:
Calculate tail seconds for host
Clear buffers on song transport jump back
Add option to not clear buffers on stop

1.0.3.name: QDelay
1.0.3.author: TiagoLr
1.0.3.description: A dual-delay with more features than it should.

1.3.1.name: GATE-12
1.3.1.author: TiagoLr
1.3.1.description: Cross-platform envelope generator for gate/volume control inspired by plugins like GrossBeat and ShaperBox.

1.1.8.name: GATE-12

1.1.8.description: Cross-platform envelope generator for gate/volume control inspired by plugins like GrossBeat and ShaperBox.

1.1.0.name: FILT-R
1.1.0.author: TiagoLr
1.1.0.description: Cross-platform filter modulator based on plugins like ShaperBox and FilterShaper.
1.1.0.changes:
Points movement no longer constrained by next and prev points.
Add more time options to sync rate 1/32 1/64 1/128 1/256.
Added Half Sine point mode.
